name: Hermes Agent
description: Nous Research Hermes — autonomous AI agent with a web dashboard.
compose:
name: "slashnode-hermes"
services:
  hermes:
    image: "nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest"
    container_name: "hermes"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: "gateway run --insecure"
    shm_size: "1g"
    ports:
      - "9119:9119"
    volumes:
      - "hermes-data:/opt/data"
    environment:
      HERMES_DASHBOARD: "1"
      HERMES_DASHBOARD_HOST: "0.0.0.0"
      HERMES_DASHBOARD_PORT: "9119"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  hermes-data:
    name: "slashnode-hermes_hermes_hermes-data"
notes: Configure Hermes from its console: open the console and run `hermes setup` to add your model provider keys (Anthropic / OpenAI) and platforms. The dashboard login uses the username/password set above.
